summary.summary: Bump APP_DEV_VERSION in Config.xcconfig from 0.8.4.2 to 0.8.4.3. APP_VERSION (0.8.4) and APP_BUILD_NUMBER (1) are unchanged in the file.
summary.userFacingImpact: This appears to be a build/CI metadata change only (development version number increment). There are no changes to application source code in this commit, so no direct runtime or user-visible behavior is evident from the diff.
